overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic industrial district. The scene features elevated highway structures, industrial tanks, and towering megabuildings under clear morning skies with warm golden lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial underpass transitioning to open street

events.description: character emerges from under dark overpass into bright morning sunlight
fully exits covered area into open industrial street with elevated highway visible

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through industrial district, emerging from shadow into sunlight

notable_agents.action: black car driving along the industrial road

entered.detail: dark concrete overpass ceiling covering the initial viewpoint
orange metal framework of elevated highway or monorail tracks
large white cylindrical storage tanks with metal ladders
tall skyscraper with distinctive ring structure near the top
tall palm tree silhouetted against the sky
illuminated commercial signs under the overpass

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a dark concrete overpass with neon signs visible in the distance. As the character walks forward, they emerge into bright morning sunlight revealing an industrial district with elevated highway rigs, large storage silos, and a towering megabuilding in the background. A black car drives along the road to the right as the scene transitions from sheltered to open.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway walkway with industrial buildings

events.description: character briefly speeds up while walking along the railing

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk under the elevated highway, following another pedestrian

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking ahead on the same path

entered.detail: large industrial building with pipes and ventilation systems
raised sidewalk with yellow painted surface
silver metal safety railing along the walkway edge

segments.scene_description: Walking steadily along a concrete sidewalk beneath the elevated highway rig, the character moves through an industrial corridor. The path is bordered by a metal railing on the left and industrial buildings on the right. The pedestrian ahead maintains a steady pace as the camera follows, with the massive highway structure looming overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial street with storage tanks and billboards

events.description: white van and other vehicles pass by on the street to the right
passing the large industrial building marked with 06, revealing more open street

agents.ego_description: continuing along the industrial sidewalk, passing billboards and storage facilities

notable_agents.action: white van driving past on the industrial road

entered.detail: large industrial structure with white 06 marking on the facade
large illuminated advertisement screen on building wall
tall modern street lamp with curved design

segments.scene_description: The character walks past industrial buildings including one marked with 06, while digital billboards glow on the left. Vehicles including a white van pass by on the street. The elevated highway structure remains visible to the right as the path continues through the industrial zone with moderate vehicle traffic.

events.description: character turns right at the street corner onto a new sidewalk
pedestrian density increases with multiple people walking on the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: turning right at the intersection and continuing along a busier sidewalk with more pedestrians

notable_agents.action: woman in athletic wear walking toward the camera
man in yellow jacket walking in the same direction

entered.detail: large green industrial warehouse with white and red stripe detailing
street intersection with curb and pedestrian crossing markings
green dumpsters and trash containers along the wall

segments.scene_description: Turning right at the street corner, the character enters a busier section of the industrial district. A large green warehouse building dominates the right side while more pedestrians appear on the sidewalk, including a woman in athletic wear approaching and a man in a yellow jacket walking ahead. Trash bins line the left wall as the path continues toward the distant megatower.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the shadows of a concrete underpass into the bright, open expanse of a futuristic industrial district. It begins in the dim light beneath an overpass with distant neon signs, moving forward until the character emerges into warm morning sunlight. As the environment opens up, the view expands to reveal massive storage silos, elevated highway rigs, and a towering megabuilding in the distance while a black car drives along the adjacent road. The scene then shifts into a steady progression along a concrete sidewalk, bordered by a metal railing and industrial buildings. The camera continues to follow the pedestrian through this industrial corridor, with the massive highway structure looming overhead as the path stretches forward.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a quiet industrial zone that gradually transitions into a bustling urban district. It begins by trailing a character past industrial buildings and glowing digital billboards, moving alongside an elevated highway as white vans and other vehicles pass by on the street. As the character reaches a street corner and turns right, the environment shifts toward a more crowded area dominated by a large green warehouse. The scene then expands to include more pedestrian activity, with a woman in athletic wear and a man in a yellow jacket appearing on the sidewalk near rows of trash bins. Finally, the camera continues its forward momentum, guiding the character through the urban clutter toward a distant, towering megastructure.
